scripts.format: oxfmt --write src index.html package.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.node.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src index.html package.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.node.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run knip && bun test
